title: Lightning Striker
description: Turn your weapon into a lightning-powered storm ⚡
body:
# ⚡ Lightning Striker

Attack enemies to call lightning ⚡  
Lightning Striker adds a powerful enchant to your weapon that allows it to become a lightning weapon. This enchantment also comes with different levels that allow chain attacks and a storm mode.  


## Enchantment Levels

**Level I - Strike**  
Summons a lightning bolt on the target when you strike.

**Level II - Chain Lightning**  
Lightning spreads to nearby enemies. This level allows you to strike multiple mobs at once.

**Level III - Storm Mode**  
Triggers a short storm that repeats on nearby enemies. This level repeats the lightning strike on nearby enemies.  


##  How to Use Lightning Striker

- Enchant your weapon with **Lightning Striker**  
- Strike any mob or player  
- Lightning will strike automatically  


##  Important

- Requires **Minecraft 1.21+**  
- Multiplayer supported  
- Avoid having too many mobs in one place; lightning effects may appear  


## 💡 Tips

- Best to use in mob fights  
- Combine with other enchantments to become powerful  
- Storm mode is best when used in a crowded area  


## ❤️ Feedback

If you have ideas, suggestions, or issues, feel free to share!
